title: Locking Support on Informix
text: Locking Support on Informix To use locking, ensure that your database enables transaction logging. If not, use U_VERSION. All locking types (optimistic, cautious, and paranoid) are supported. The default locking type is cautious; the locking granularity is set to row locking. Special considerations Informix cannot lock records in the way that Uniface requires, unless transaction logging is enabled. When transaction logging is enabled, the connector makes sure that you are always in a transaction. You should also be aware that Informix has a maximum number of locks which can be simultaneously held. The maximum depends on the operating system in use and the way in which you have configured Informix. For more information, see your Informix documentation. U_VERSION It is recommended that you use U_VERSION as this significantly reduces the chance of locking conflicts. Related Links U_VERSION for Improving Locking Performance Uniface supports a version mechanism which can improve performance by using a field called U_VERSION. U_VERSION is a one-byte field which you must assign to an entity for it to work. In other words, it is not automatically available. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
